entries.source: We may amend Terms at any time by posting the amended terms on this site. It is your responsibility to review these Terms periodically. Your continued use of the Platform following the posting of revised Terms means that you accept and agree to the changes. You are expected to check this page frequently so you are aware of any changes, as they are binding on you. By continuing to access or use our Service after any revisions become effective, you agree to be bound by the revised terms. If you do not agree to the new terms, you are no longer authorized to use Service.
entries.value: Tayo may amend Terms at anumang oras ng posting ang amended terms sa ito site. Ito ay iyong responsibility magrepaso mga ito Terms periodically. Iyong continued Gamitin ng ang Platform following ang posting revised Terms means na ikaw tanggapin at sumasang-ayon sa ang changes. Ikaw ay expected suriin ito pahina frequently kaya ikaw ay aware ng anumang changes, bilang sila ay binding sa ikaw. Ng continuing sa access o Gamitin aming Serbisyo pagkatapos anumang revisions become effective, ikaw sumasang-ayon sa maging bound ng ang revised terms. Kung ikaw gawin hindi sumasang-ayon sa ang new terms, ikaw ay no longer authorized gamitin Serbisyo.

entries.source: We may disclose personal information that we collect, or you provide: Disclosure for Law Enforcement: Under certain circumstances, we may be required to disclose your Data if required to do so by law or in response to valid requests by public authorities. Business Transaction: If our subsidiaries or we are involved in a merger, acquisition or asset sale, your Personal Data may be transferred. Other cases. We may disclose your information also: to our subsidiaries and affiliates; to contractors, service providers, and other third parties we use to support our business; to fulfil the purpose for which you provide it; to include your company’s logo on our website; for any other purpose disclosed by us when you provide the information; with your consent in any other cases; if we believe disclosure is necessary or appropriate to protect the rights, property, or safety of the Company, our customers, or others.
entries.value: Tayo may ibunyag personal impormasyon na tayo mangolekta, o ikaw magbigay: Disclosure para sa Batas Enforcement: Sa ilalim ng certain circumstances, tayo may maging required sa ibunyag iyong Data kung required sa gawin kaya ng batas o sa response sa valid requests ng pampubliko authorities. Negosyo Transaction: Kung aming subsidiaries o tayo ay involved sa isang merger, acquisition o asset sale, iyong Personal Data may maging inilipat. Other mga kaso. Tayo may ibunyag iyong impormasyon also: sa aming subsidiaries at affiliates; sa contractors, Serbisyo providers, at other third parties tayo Gamitin sa suporta aming negosyo; tuparin ang layunin para sa alin ikaw magbigay ito; sa isama iyong Kompanya’s logo sa aming website; para sa anumang other layunin disclosed ng amin Kapag ikaw magbigay ang impormasyon; kasama ang iyong pahintulot sa anumang other mga kaso; kung tayo believe disclosure ay necessary o appropriate sa protektahan ang mga karapatan, property, o safety ng ang Kompanya, aming customers, o others.

entries.source: We may employ third party companies and individuals to facilitate our Service (“Service Providers”), provide Service on our behalf, perform Service-related services or assist us in analysing how our Service is used. These third parties have access to your Personal Data only to perform these tasks on our behalf and are obligated not to disclose or use it for any other purpose.
entries.value: Tayo may employ third party companies at individuals sa facilitate aming Serbisyo (“Serbisyo Providers”), magbigay Serbisyo sa aming behalf, perform Service-related mga serbisyo o assist amin sa analysing paano aming Serbisyo ay ginamit. Mga ito third parties mayroon access sa iyong Personal Data lamang sa perform mga ito mga gawain sa aming behalf at ay obligated hindi sa ibunyag o Gamitin ito para sa anumang other layunin.

entries.source: We may provide paid products and/or services within Service. In that case, we use third-party services for payment processing (e.g. payment processors). We will not store or collect your payment card details. That information is provided directly to our third-party payment processors whose use of your personal information is governed by their Privacy Policy. These payment processors adhere to the standards set by PCI-DSS as managed by the PCI Security Standards Council, which is a joint effort of brands like Visa, Mastercard, American Express and Discover. PCI-DSS requirements help ensure the secure handling of payment information.
entries.value: Tayo may magbigay paid products at/or mga serbisyo within Serbisyo. Sa na kaso, tayo Gamitin third-party mga serbisyo para sa bayad pagproseso (e.g. bayad processors). Tayo magiging hindi imbakin o mangolekta iyong bayad card details. Na impormasyon ay ibinigay directly sa aming third-party bayad processors kanino Gamitin ng iyong personal impormasyon ay governed ng kanilang Privacy Polisiya. Mga ito bayad processors adhere sa ang standards set ng PCI-DSS bilang managed ng ang PCI Security Standards Council, alin ay isang joint effort ng brands like Visa, Mastercard, AmeriMaaari bang Express at Discover. PCI-DSS requirements tulong ensure ang secure handling bayad impormasyon.

entries.source: We may terminate or suspend your account and bar access to Service immediately, without prior notice or liability, under our sole discretion, for any reason whatsoever and without limitation, including but not limited to a breach of Terms. If you wish to terminate your account, you may simply discontinue using Service. All provisions of Terms which by their nature should survive termination shall survive termination, including, without limitation, ownership provisions, warranty disclaimers, indemnity and limitations of liability.
entries.value: Tayo may wakasan o suspend iyong account at bar access sa Serbisyo immediately, nang walang prior notice o liability, sa ilalim ng aming sole discretion, para sa anumang dahilan whatsoever at nang walang limitation, including pero hindi limited sa isang breach ng Terms. Kung ikaw wish sa wakasan iyong account, ikaw may simple discontinue gamit ang Serbisyo. Lahat provisions ng Terms alin ng kanilang nature dapat survive termination shall survive termination, including, nang walang limitation, ownership provisions, warranty disclaimers, indemnity at limitations ng liability.

entries.source: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page. We will let you know via email and/or a prominent notice on our Service, prior to the change becoming effective and update “effective date” at the top of this Privacy Policy. You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes. Changes to this Privacy Policy are effective when they are posted on this page.
entries.value: Tayo may update aming Privacy Polisiya mula sa oras sa oras. Tayo magiging abisuhan ikaw ng anumang changes ng posting ang new Privacy Polisiya sa ito pahina. Tayo magiging let ikaw alam via email at/or isang prominent notice sa aming Serbisyo, prior sa ang change becoming effective at update “effective petsa” at ang top ng ito Privacy Polisiya. Ikaw ay advised magrepaso ito Privacy Polisiya periodically para sa anumang changes. Changes sa ito Privacy Polisiya ay effective kapag sila ay posted sa ito pahina.

entries.source: We may use remarketing services to advertise on third party websites to you after you visited our Service. We and our third-party vendors use cookies to inform, optimise and serve ads based on your past visits to our Service.
entries.value: Tayo may Gamitin remarketing mga serbisyo sa advertise sa third party websites sa ikaw pagkatapos ikaw visited aming Serbisyo. Tayo at aming third-party vendors Gamitin cookies sa inform, optimise at serve ads based sa iyong past visits sa aming Serbisyo.

entries.source: We may use third-party Service Providers to automate the development process of our Service.
entries.value: Tayo may Gamitin third-party Serbisyo Providers sa automate ang development iproseso ng aming Serbisyo.

entries.source: We may use third-party Service Providers to monitor and analyze the use of our Service.
entries.value: Tayo may Gamitin third-party Serbisyo Providers subaybayan at analyze ang Gamitin ng aming Serbisyo.

entries.source: We may use third-party Service Providers to show advertisements to you to help support and maintain our Service.
entries.value: Tayo may Gamitin third-party Serbisyo Providers sa show advertisements sa ikaw sa tulong suporta at panatilihin aming Serbisyo.

entries.source: We reserve the right to withdraw or amend our Service, and any service or material we provide via Service, in our sole discretion without notice. We will not be liable if for any reason all or any part of Service is unavailable at any time or for any period. From time to time, we may restrict access to some parts of Service, or the entire Service, to users, including registered users.
entries.value: Inilalaan namin ang karapatan sa withdraw o amend aming Serbisyo, at anumang Serbisyo o material tayo magbigay via Serbisyo, sa aming sole discretion nang walang notice. Tayo magiging hindi maging liable kung para sa anumang dahilan lahat o anumang part ng Serbisyo ay unavailable at anumang oras o para sa anumang period. Mula sa oras sa oras, tayo may restrict access sa some parts ng Serbisyo, o ang entire Serbisyo, gamitinrs, including registered mga user.

entries.source: We respect the intellectual property rights of others. It is our policy to respond to any claim that Content posted on Service infringes on the copyright or other intellectual property rights (“Infringement”) of any person or entity. If you are a copyright owner, or authorized on behalf of one, and you believe that the copyrighted work has been copied in a way that constitutes copyright infringement, please submit your claim via email to support@inspir.app, with the subject line: “Copyright Infringement” and include in your claim a detailed description of the alleged Infringement as detailed below, under “DMCA Notice and Procedure for Copyright Infringement Claims” You may be held accountable for damages (including costs and attorneys’ fees) for misrepresentation or bad-faith claims on the infringement of any Content found on and/or through Service on your copyright.
entries.value: Tayo respect ang intellectual property mga karapatan ng others. Ito ay aming polisiya sa respond sa anumang pahayag na Content posted sa Serbisyo infringes sa ang copyright o other intellectual property mga karapatan (“Infringement”) ng anumang tao o entity. Kung ikaw ay isang copyright owner, o authorized sa behalf ng isa, at ikaw believe na ang copyrighted work mayroon naging copied sa isang way na constitutes copyright infringement, please submit iyong pahayag via email sa support@inspir.app, kasama ang paksa line: “Copyright Infringement” at isama sa iyong pahayag isang detailed description ng ang alleged Infringement bilang detailed below, sa ilalim ng “DMCA Notice at Procedure para sa Copyright Infringement Mga pahayag” Ikaw may maging held accountable para sa damages (including costs at attorneys’ fees) para sa misrepresentation o bad-faith mga pahayag sa ang infringement ng anumang Content found sa at/or sa pamamagitan ng Serbisyo sa iyong copyright.

entries.source: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track the activity on our Service and we hold certain information. Cookies are files with a small amount of data which may include an anonymous unique identifier. Cookies are sent to your browser from a website and stored on your device. Other tracking technologies are also used such as beacons, tags and scripts to collect and track information and to improve and analyze our Service. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent. However, if you do not accept cookies, you may not be able to use some portions of our Service. Examples of Cookies we use:Session Cookies: We use Session Cookies to operate our Service. Preference Cookies: We use Preference Cookies to remember your preferences and various settings. Security Cookies: We use Security Cookies for security purposes. Advertising Cookies: Advertising Cookies are used to serve you with advertisements that may be relevant to you and your interests.
entries.value: Tayo Gamitin cookies at similar tracking technologies sa track ang activity sa aming Serbisyo at tayo hold certain impormasyon. Cookies ay files kasama ang isang small amount ng data alin may isama isang anonymous unique identifier. Cookies ay sent sa iyong Tingnan angr mula sa isang website at nakaimbak sa iyong device. Other tracking technologies ay also ginamit such bilang beacons, tags at scripts sa mangolekta at track impormasyon at pahusayin at analyze aming Serbisyo. Ikaw Maaari bang instruct iyong Tingnan angr sa refGamitin lahat cookies o sa indicate kapag isang cookie ay pagiging sent. However, kung ikaw gawin hindi tanggapin cookies, ikaw may hindi maging able gamitin some portions ng aming Serbisyo. Mga halimbawa ng Cookies tayo gamitin:Session Cookies: Tayo Gamitin Session Cookies sa operate aming Serbisyo. Preference Cookies: Tayo Gamitin Preference Cookies matandaan iyong preferences at various settings. Security Cookies: Tayo Gamitin Security Cookies para sa security mga layunin. Advertising Cookies: Advertising Cookies ay ginamit sa serve ikaw kasama ang advertisements na may maging relevant sa ikaw at iyong interests.

entries.source: We went outside our planet. However, the most rapid and significant advancement was in communication and technology which has connected a global population of over 3 billion people.
entries.value: Tayo went outside aming planet. However, ang pinaka rapid at significant advancement ay sa communication at technology alin mayroon connected isang global population ng sa ibabaw ng 3 billion mga tao.

entries.source: We will retain your Personal Data only for as long as is necessary for the purposes set out in this Privacy Policy. We will retain and use your Personal Data to the extent necessary to comply with our legal obligations (for example, if we are required to retain your data to comply with applicable laws), resolve disputes, and enforce our legal agreements and policies. We will also retain Usage Data for internal analysis purposes. Usage Data is generally retained for a shorter period, except when this data is used to strengthen the security or to improve the functionality of our Service, or we are legally obligated to retain this data for longer time periods.
entries.value: Tayo magiging panatilihin iyong Personal Data lamang para sa bilang long bilang ay necessary para sa ang mga layunin set out sa ito Privacy Polisiya. Tayo magiging panatilihin at Gamitin iyong Personal Data sa ang extent necessary sa comply kasama ang aming legal mga obligasyon (para sa halimbawa, kung tayo ay required sa panatilihin iyong data sa comply kasama ang applicable mga batas), reLutasin ang disputes, at enforce aming legal agreements at policies. Tayo magiging also panatilihin Usage Data para sa internal analysis mga layunin. Usage Data ay generally retained para sa isang shorter period, except kapag ito data ay ginamit sa strengthen ang security o pahusayin ang functionality ng aming Serbisyo, o tayo ay legally obligated sa panatilihin ito data para sa longer oras periods.

entries.source: When you create an account with us, you guarantee that the information you provide us is accurate, complete, and current at all times. Inaccurate, incomplete, or obsolete information may result in the immediate termination of your account on Service. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password, including but not limited to the restriction of access to your computer and/or account. You agree to accept responsibility for any and all activities or actions that occur under your account and/or password, whether your password is with our Service or a third-party service. You must notify us immediately upon becoming aware of any breach of security or unauthorized use of your account. You may not use as a username the name of another person or entity or that is not lawfully available for use, a name or trademark that is subject to any rights of another person or entity other than you, without appropriate authorization. You may not use as a username any name that is offensive, vulgar or obscene. We reserve the right to refuse service, terminate accounts, remove or edit content, or cancel orders in our sole discretion.
entries.value: Kapag gumawa ka ng account sa amin, ginagarantiya mong ang impormasyong ibinibigay mo sa amin ay tumpak, kumpleto, at napapanahon sa lahat ng oras. Ang hindi tumpak, hindi kumpleto, o luma nang impormasyon ay maaaring magresulta sa agarang pagwawakas ng iyong account sa Serbisyo. Responsable kang panatilihin ang pagiging kumpidensyal ng iyong account at password, including pero hindi limited sa ang restriction ng access sa iyong computer at/or account. Sumasang-ayon kang tanggapin ang responsibilidad para sa anumang at lahat activities o actions na occur sa ilalim ng iyong account at/or password, kung iyong password ay kasama ang aming Serbisyo o isang third-party Serbisyo. Dapat mo kaming abisuhan agad upon becoming aware ng anumang breach ng security o unauthorized Gamitin ng iyong account. Hindi mo maaaring gamitin bilang username ang name ng another tao o entity o na ay hindi lawfully available para gamitin, isang name o trademark na ay paksa anumang mga karapatan ng another tao o entity other kaysa ikaw, nang walang appropriate authorization. Hindi mo maaaring gamitin bilang username anumang name na ay nakakasakit, bastos o malaswa. Inilalaan namin ang karapatan sa refGamitin Serbisyo, wakasan accounts, alisin o i-edit content, o kanselahin orders sa aming sole discretion.

entries.source: When you paste notes into AI, ask it to split broad ideas into those jobs. A deck with 18 specific cards is usually better than a deck with 5 giant cards that each contain a whole paragraph.
entries.value: Kapag ikaw paste mga tala tungo sa AI, magtanong ito sa split broad mga ideya tungo sa mga iyon mga gawain. Isang deck kasama ang 18 tiyak mga card ay karaniwan mas mahusay kaysa isang deck kasama ang 5 giant mga card na bawat contain isang whole talata.

entries.source: While using our Service, we may also collect the following information: sex, age, date of birth, place of birth, passport details, citizenship, registration at place of residence and actual address, telephone number (work, mobile), details of documents on education, qualification, professional training, employment agreements, information on bonuses and compensation, information on marital status, family members, social security (or other taxpayer identification) number, office location and other data. Payment Data. We may collect data necessary to process your payment if you make purchases, such as your payment instrument number (such as a credit card number), and the security code associated with your payment instrument. All payment data is stored by Razorpay. You may find their privacy notice link(s) here: https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://razorpay.com/privacy
entries.value: Habang ginagamit ang aming Serbisyo, tayo may also mangolekta ang following impormasyon: sex, age, petsa ng birth, place ng birth, passport details, citizenship, registration at place ng residence at actual address, telephone number (work, mobile), details ng documents sa education, qualification, professional training, employment agreements, impormasyon sa bonuses at compensation, impormasyon sa marital status, pamilya members, social security (o other taxpayer identification) number, office location at other data. Bayad Data. Tayo may mangolekta data necessary magproseso ng iyong bayad kung ikaw Gumawa ng purchases, such bilang iyong bayad instrument number (such bilang isang credit card number), at ang security code associated kasama ang iyong bayad instrument. Lahat Bayad Data ay nakaimbak ng Razorpay. Ikaw may Hanapin ang kanilang privacy notice link(s) here: https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://razorpay.com/privacy

entries.source: While using our Service, we may ask you to provide us with certain personally identifiable information that can be used to contact or identify you (“Personal Data”). Personally identifiable information may include, but is not limited to: Email address of Student and Parent First name and last name of Student and Parent Phone number of Student and Parent Address, Country, State, Province, ZIP/Postal code, City School name Class Cookies and Usage Data We may use your Data to contact you with newsletters, marketing or promotional materials and other information that may interest you. You may opt-out of receiving any, or all, of these communications from us by following the unsubscribe link. Usage Data, We may also collect information that your browser sends whenever you visit our Service or when you access Service by or through any device (“Usage Data”). This Usage Data may include information such as your computer’s Internet Protocol address (e.g. IP address), browser type, browser version, the pages of our Service that you visit, the time and date of your visit, the time spent on those pages, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data. When you access Service with a device, this Usage Data may include information such as the type of device you use, your device unique ID, the IP address of your device, your device operating system, the type of Internet browser you use, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data.
entries.value: Habang ginagamit ang aming Serbisyo, maaari ka naming hilingang magbigay sa amin kasama ang certain personal na makapagpapakilalang impormasyon na Maaari bang maging ginamit makipag-ugnayan sa o identify ikaw (“Personal Data”). Personal na makapagpapakilalang impormasyon may isama, pero ay hindi limited sa: Email address ng Estudyante at Magulang Una name at huli name ng Estudyante at Magulang Telepono number ng Estudyante at Magulang Address, Bansa, Estado, Province, ZIP/Postal code, Lungsod Paaralan name Class Cookies at Usage Data Tayo may Gamitin iyong Data makipag-ugnayan sa ikaw kasama ang newsletters, marketing o promotional materials at other impormasyon na may interest ikaw. Ikaw may opt-out ng receiving anumang, o lahat, ng mga ito communications mula sa amin ng following ang unsubscribe link. Usage Data, Tayo may also mangolekta impormasyon na iyong Tingnan angr sends whenever ikaw visit aming Serbisyo o Kapag ikaw access Serbisyo ng o sa pamamagitan ng anumang device (“Usage Data”). Ito Usage Data may isama impormasyon such bilang iyong computer’s Internet Protocol address (e.g. IP address), Tingnan angr type, Tingnan angr version, ang mga pahina ng aming Serbisyo na ikaw visit, ang oras at petsa ng iyong visit, ang oras spent sa mga iyon mga pahina, unique device identifiers at other diagnostic data. Kapag ikaw access Serbisyo kasama ang isang device, ito Usage Data may isama impormasyon such bilang type ng device ikaw gamitin, iyong device unique ID, ang IP address ng iyong device, iyong device operating system, ang type ng Internet Tingnan angr ikaw gamitin, unique device identifiers at other diagnostic data.

entries.source: World History at all points of time has been like zooming out of a picture, A picture that kept changing. The centuries leading up to the 19th century marked a turning point in human history, as the world moved from a flat, limited view of the world to a growing understanding of new territories and colonies. The French Revolution marked the first time when a large population gathered to protest and establish the ideals of liberty, equality, and fraternity. The events of World War II also shaped the world for the next century and laid the foundation for the 21st century.
entries.value: World Kasaysayan at lahat mga punto ng oras mayroon naging like zooming out ng isang picture, Isang picture na kept changing. Ang centuries leading up sa ang 19th century marked isang pagbabago punto sa human kasaysayan, bilang world moved mula sa isang flat, limited view ng ang world sa isang growing understanding new territories at colonies. Ang Rebolusyong Pranses marked ang una oras kapag isang large population gathered sa proSubukan ang at establish ang ideals ng liberty, equality, at fraternity. Ang mga event ng World War II also shaped ang world para sa ang susunod century at laid ang foundation para sa ang 21st century.

entries.source: Yes, but the recommended workflow is hint-first. Use it to understand the method, check your work, and review errors instead of copying a final answer.
entries.value: Yes, pero ang recommended workflow ay hint-first. Gamitin ito maunawaan ang paraan, suriin iyong work, at Repasuhin mga error instead ng copying isang huling sagot.

entries.source: Yes, when it gives hints, checks reasoning, explains mistakes, and asks you to produce the final answer instead of writing it for you.
entries.value: Oo, kapag nagbibigay ito ng mga hint, sinusuri ang pangangatwiran, ipinapaliwanag ang mga pagkakamali, at hinihiling sa iyo na ikaw ang gumawa ng huling sagot sa halip na isulat ito para sa iyo.

entries.source: Yes. {value1} opens as a public guest learning mode at {value2}, so you can start with a few free guest messages before creating an account.
entries.value: Oo. {value1} opens bilang isang pampublikong guest pag-aaral mode at {value2}, kaya ikaw Maaari bang magsimula kasama ang isang ilang libre guest messages bago paglikha isang account.

entries.source: Yes. A good workflow is to learn the foundation from a trusted lesson source, then use inspir to ask follow-up questions, practise recall, repair misconceptions, and plan what to review next.
entries.value: Oo. Isang mahusay workflow ay matuto ang foundation mula sa isang trusted lesson source, pagkatapos Gamitin inspir magtanong follow-up mga tanong, magsanay recall, repair mga maling akala, at Magplano ng ano magrepaso susunod.

entries.source: Yes. A school can begin by testing public modes, then move toward a pilot or tailored deployment when the use case, content needs, and funding path are clear.
entries.value: Oo. Isang paaralan Maaari bang magsimula ng testing pampubliko mga mode, pagkatapos lumipat toward isang pilot o iniangkop deployment kapag ang Gamitin kaso, content kailangan, at funding landas ay malinaw.

entries.source: Yes. Audience pages link only to public guest modes, guides, prompt starters, learning paths, and AI-readable discovery files. Private saved chats remain excluded.
entries.value: Oo. Mga pahina para sa madla link lamang sa mga pampublikong guest mode, mga gabay, prompt starters, mga landas sa pag-aaral, at AI-readable discovery files. Mga pribadong naka-save na chat remain excluded.

entries.source: Yes. Category pages link into public guest modes, learning paths, and article clusters so learners can move from reading into tutoring, quizzes, flashcards, debate, planning, or feedback.
entries.value: Oo. Category mga pahina link tungo sa mga pampublikong guest mode, mga landas sa pag-aaral, at artikulo clusters kaya mga mag-aaral Maaari bang lumipat mula sa pagbabasa tungo sa tutoring, mga quiz, mga flashcard, debate, pagpaplano, o feedback.

entries.source: Yes. Code Tutor can explain concepts, walk through examples, ask you to predict behavior, and help you practice without turning learning into copy-paste.
entries.value: Oo. Code Tutor Maaari bang Ipaliwanag ang mga konsepto, walk sa pamamagitan ng mga halimbawa, magtanong ikaw sa predict behavior, at tulong ikaw Magsanay ng nang walang pagbabago pag-aaral tungo sa copy-paste.

entries.source: Yes. Exam Prep Planner can turn your topics, date, and available time into a practical revision sequence with practice and review.
entries.value: Oo. Paghahanda sa exam Planner Maaari bang Gawing iyong mga paksa, petsa, at available oras tungo sa isang praktikal revision sequence kasama ang Magsanay ng at repaso.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes let teachers test learning behavior before discussing a custom deployment.
entries.value: Oo. Mga pampublikong guest mode let mga guro Subukan ang asal sa pag-aaral bago pagtalakay isang custom deployment.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, quizzes, flashcards, and writing feedback open directly.
entries.value: Oo. Mga pampublikong guest mode such bilang Matutunan ang Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, mga quiz, mga flashcard, at feedback sa pagsusulat Buksan directly.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly from canonical /chat/{topicSlug} URLs.
entries.value: Oo. Mga pampublikong guest mode such bilang Matutunan ang Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, mga quiz, at mga flashcard Buksan directly mula sa canonical /chat/{topicSlug} URLs.

entries.source: Yes. Public mode URLs open directly in guest mode so a learner can start immediately, then create an account later if they want saved history or more usage.
entries.value: Oo. Mga pampublikong mode URL Buksan direkta sa guest mode kaya isang mag-aaral Maaari bang magsimula immediately, pagkatapos Gumawa ng isang account later kung sila gusto saved kasaysayan o mas marami usage.

entries.source: Yes. Public modes work for school topics, professional skills, coding, research, projects, and personal study routines.
entries.value: Oo. Pampubliko mga mode work para sa paaralan mga paksa, professional skills, coding, pananaliksik, projects, at personal study mga routine.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic chats such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly in guest mode.
entries.value: Oo. Ang mga pampublikong topic chat tulad ng Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, mga quiz, at flashcard ay direktang bumubukas sa guest mode.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic entrypoints such as /chat/learn-anything and /chat/socratic-instruction are intended to be indexable learning pages.
entries.value: Oo. Pampubliko mga entrypoint ng paksa such bilang /chat/learn-anything at /chat/socratic-instruction ay intended sa maging indexable pag-aaral mga pahina.

entries.source: Yes. Quiz, Flashcard Builder, and Spaced Review are public modes designed for active recall and mistake repair.
entries.value: Oo. Quiz, Flashcard Builder, at Spaced Repasuhin ay pampubliko mga mode designed para sa aktibong pag-alala at pag-aayos ng pagkakamali.

entries.source: Yes. Reading Companion can simplify passages, ask questions, explain vocabulary, and help you identify the main claim and supporting evidence.
entries.value: Oo. Pagbabasa Companion Maaari bang simplify passages, Magtanong, Ipaliwanag ang bokabularyo, at tulong ikaw identify ang main pahayag at supporting ebidensya.
